title: Ideal Gas Law
content: The pressure, volume, temperature, and amount of an ideal gas are related by PV = nRT.
extended_content: P: absolute pressure (Pa), V: volume (m³), n: moles (mol), R: universal gas constant (8.314 J/mol·K), T: absolute temperature (K).  For real gases, use van der Waals or Peng-Robinson equations of state.
units: P: Pa, V: m³, T: K, n: mol
source: Smith, Van Ness & Abbott, Introduction to Chemical Engineering Thermodynamics, 8th ed.
